title: A pilot spotted a disintegrating UFO at great speed over Minaçu-GO [1994]
excerpt: AUG 2nd, 1994. Time: 18:07. Duration: 5 seconds. text_preview: AUG 2nd, 1994. Time: 18:07. Duration: 5 seconds. A commercial pilot from Goiânia-GO, reported seeing a UFO when he was “in charge of the [aircraft] PT-ESA on August 2nd, 1994, at 18:07, on the RD010/145NM [nautical miles] from BRS [Brasília], at bow 190°, FL 080. According to the pilot’s description, “the object resembled an aircraft with a disintegrating nose. It crossed from right to left at descending altitude.” The witness was unable to determine precisely how far he was from the sighted object, but stated that it was higher than his plane. The sighting occurred when PT-ESA was flying over
summary: A commercial pilot over Minaçu-GO reported a blue-green oval UFO resembling a disintegrating aircraft leaving a trail, crossing at jet speed on Aug 2, 1994.
